alternateName: Biased, Imbalanced, Dynamic Tabular Datasets for ML Evaluation.

distribution.name: archive.zip
distribution.description: Archive containing all the contents of the Bank Account Fraud Dataset Suite (NeurIPS 2022) dataset

distribution.name: Base.csv
distribution.description: Base dataset of the BAF suite. Synthetic account opening fraud dataset with 1M instances based on a real-world dataset. It has a "month" column to allow for temporal validation, and three protected attributes (age group, employment status, and % income) to allow for fair ML evaluation.

distribution.name: Variant I.csv
distribution.description: Biased variant of the Base dataset. Additional group size disparity data bias, but otherwise same underlying distribution as the Base dataset (see paper for additional details on data bias).

distribution.name: Variant II.csv
distribution.description: Biased variant of the Base dataset. Additional prevalence disparity data bias on age group, but otherwise same underlying distribution (see paper for additional details on data bias).

distribution.name: Variant III.csv
distribution.description: Biased variant of the Base dataset. Additional separability data bias, but otherwise same underlying distribution (see paper for additional details on data bias).

distribution.name: Variant IV.csv
distribution.description: Biased variant of the Base dataset. Additional prevalence disparity data bias in the first six months, but otherwise same underlying distribution (see paper for additional details on data bias).

distribution.name: Variant V.csv
distribution.description: Biased variant of the Base dataset. Additional separability data bias in the first six months, but otherwise same underlying distribution (see paper for additional details on data bias).

field.name: fraud_bool
field.description: Fraud label (1 if fraud, 0 if legit)

field.name: income
field.description: Annual income of the applicant in quantiles. Ranges between [0, 1].

field.name: name_email_similarity
field.description:
Metric of similarity between email and applicant’s
name. Higher values represent higher similarity. Ranges between [0, 1].

field.name: prev_address_months_count
field.description:
: Number of months in previous registered
address of the applicant, i.e. the applicant’s previous residence, if applicable. Ranges
between [−1, 380] months (-1 is a missing value).

field.name: current_address_months_count
field.description:
Months in currently registered address of
the applicant. Ranges between [−1, 406] months (-1 is a missing value).

field.name: customer_age
field.description: Applicant’s age in bins per decade (e.g, 20-29 is represented as 20).

field.name: days_since_request
field.description:
Number of days passed since application was done.
Ranges between [0, 78] days.

field.name: intended_balcon_amount
field.description:
Initial transferred amount for application.
Ranges between [−1, 108].

field.name: payment_type
field.description:
Credit payment plan type. 5 possible (annonymized)
values.

field.name: zip_count_4w
field.description:
Number of applications within same zip code in last 4 weeks.
Ranges between [1, 5767].

field.name: velocity_6h
field.description:
Velocity of total applications made in last 6 hours i.e., average
number of applications per hour in the last 6 hours. Ranges between [−211, 24763].

field.name: velocity_24h
field.description:
Velocity of total applications made in last 24 hours i.e., average
number of applications per hour in the last 24 hours. Ranges between [1329, 9527].

field.name: velocity_4w
field.description:
Velocity of total applications made in last 4 weeks, i.e., average
number of applications per hour in the last 4 weeks. Ranges between [2779, 7043].

field.name: bank_branch_count_8w
field.description:
Number of total applications in the selected bank
branch in last 8 weeks. Ranges between [0, 2521].

field.name: date_of_birth_distinct_emails_4w
field.description:
Number of emails for applicants with
same date of birth in last 4 weeks. Ranges between [0, 42].

field.name: employment_status
field.description:
Employment status of the applicant. 7 possible
(annonymized) values.

field.name: credit_risk_score
field.description:
Internal score of application risk. Ranges between
[−176, 387].

field.name: email_is_free
field.description: Domain of application email (either free or paid).

field.name: housing_status
field.description:
Current residential status for applicant. 7 possible
(annonymized) values.

field.name: phone_home_valid
field.description: Validity of provided home phone.

field.name: phone_mobile_valid
field.description: Validity of provided mobile phone.

field.name: bank_months_count
field.description:
How old is previous account (if held) in months.
Ranges between [−1, 31] months (-1 is a missing value).

field.name: has_other_cards
field.description: If applicant has other cards from the same banking company.

field.name: proposed_credit_limit
field.description:
Applicant’s proposed credit limit. Ranges between
[200, 2000].

field.name: foreign_request
field.description: If origin country of request is different from bank’s country.

field.name: source
field.description:
Online source of application. Either browser(INTERNET) or mobile app
(APP).

field.name: session_length_in_minutes
field.description:
Length of user session in banking website in
minutes. Ranges between [−1, 107] minutes

field.name: device_os
field.description:
Operative system of device that made request. Possible values
are: Windows, Macintox, Linux, X11, or other.

field.name: keep_alive_session
field.description: User option on session logout.

field.name: device_distinct_emails_8w
field.description:
Number of distinct emails in banking website from
the used device in last 8 weeks. Ranges between [0, 3].

field.name: device_fraud_count
field.description:
Number of fraudulent applications with used device.
Ranges between [0, 1].

field.name: month
field.description: Month where the application was made. Ranges between [0, 7].
